a.xlink:title: AutoStep that blocks for a fixed number of milliseconds.
Abstract interface that every autonomous step must implement.
Abstract base class for all robot subsystems.
Buffered servo wrapper that defers writes until update() is called.
Quadrature encoder wrapper providing position, velocity, and acceleration.
PID controller classes with optional nonlinear extensions and feedforward support.
Central configuration: pin assignments, physical constants, and PID gains.
Simple digital solenoid driver (currently unused in primary code path).
Unified single-channel motor controller supporting TB9051FTG and L298N drivers.
Dual closed-loop motor controller wrapping an L298N driver with two independent PID loops.
